title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sonata Software - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sonata Software - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sonata Software, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sonata Software:
Sonata Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software!
